allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Yves Zigashane\\Documents\\Projects\\BeanPath" -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) {"Directory"} else {"File"}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
